name: Chocolate Julep Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust, combine the cookie crumbs, sugar, and melted butter. Press firmly and evenly into a 9-inch springform pan. Place in refrigerator while making the filling.
2. Melt the chocolate in a heavy saucepan.
3. Beat the cream cheese and sugar until smooth.
4. Add sour cream and blend well.
5. Beat in one egg at a time, ensuring low speed is maintained.
6. Blend in bourbon and Creme de menthe.
7. Pour 1-1/4 cups of batter into another bowl.
8. Mix the remaining batter with the melted chocolate.
9. Fill the crust with the chocolate batter, then slowly pour on the plain batter, creating a swirling pattern if desired.
10. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes. The sides will be puffed and the center will be soft; it will firm up when cooled.
11. Chill for at least 6 hours before serving.
